# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: KongAPI
metadata: 
 name: example-apigw
spec:  
 gatewayTimeout: "60"
 status: healthy
 services:    # Define your Service Object(s) here    
 - hostname: service_one          // Hostnames for the microservices endpoints. You should add more hosts based on how many are there in total 
 portNamePrefixes: ['port']      
 protocols:   [ 'http', ...]     
 namePatternSuffixLengths: []    # Length of names generated when no suffix is provided ie default for the service object. Set to null or empty if not applicable (default)       
 enabled: true  // Enable all services and routes defined here by setting it as 'true'  
 annotations : {}
